title: Core Components of an Expert System
description: A flowchart illustrating the functional architecture of a rule-based expert system, showing how data flows between its core components to emulate human expert decision-making.
relationships: User inputs data via the Interface into Working Memory
Inference Engine matches data in Working Memory to rules in the Knowledge Base
Inference Engine adds new facts or conclusions to Working Memory
Final conclusion is presented to the User via the Interface
Explanation Facility justifies the conclusion by tracing the applied rules
